title: Pallimanna Siva Temple
tagline: Pallimanna Siva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Pallimanna Siva Temple is a temple located at Kumbalangad, a small village in Thrissur District, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Pallimanna Siva Temple is a temple located at Kumbalangad, a small village in Thrissur District, Kerala, India. The temple is located at Kumbalangad - Kanjirakode Road, Vadakkancherry. Archeological Survey of India declared the mural paintings in the walls of this temple as protected monument of national importance since 1983. The main deity in this temple is Lord shiva.

topPlaces.name: Attoor (Kerala)
topPlaces.description: Attoor is a village that is located in Kerala, India, in the Thrissur district. It has an area of roughly 48 square kilometers (18.5 square miles).

topPlaces.name: Kumbalangad
topPlaces.description: Kumbalangad is a neighbourhood near Wadakkancherry in Thrissur of Kerala state in India.

topPlaces.name: Kanjirakode
topPlaces.description: Kanjirakode is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Chittanda
topPlaces.description: Chittanda is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The place is renowned for the Karthyayani temple.

topPlaces.name: Puducode
topPlaces.description: Puthucode (also spelled Puducode and Puthukkode) is a village and gram panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated in Alathur taluk, around 12 km from Alathur and 4 km from Vadakkancherry, on the western bank of Mangalam River, a sub-tributary of Bharathapuzha.

topPlaces.name: Wadakkancherry, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Wadakkancherry (IPA: [ʋɐɖɐkːaːɲdʒeːɾi]) is a major town in Thrissur, Kerala. Up until 1860, this area was part of Chelakkara Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Enkakkad
topPlaces.description: Enkakkad is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a small village with beautiful nature.

topPlaces.name: Veeranimangalam Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Veeranimangalam Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva and Lord Narasimha is situated at Enkakkad of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. The Lord Shiva of the temple is the Shiva Lingam facing west.

items.note: Attoor is a village that is located in Kerala, India, in the Thrissur district. It has an area of roughly 48 square kilometers (18.5 square miles).
Kumbalangad is a neighbourhood near Wadakkancherry in Thrissur of Kerala state in India.
Kanjirakode is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.
Chittanda is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. The place is renowned for the Karthyayani temple.

Puthucode (also spelled Puducode and Puthukkode) is a village and gram panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. It is situated in Alathur taluk, around 12 km from Alathur and 4 km from Vadakkancherry, on the western bank of Mangalam River, a sub-tributary of Bharathapuzha.
Wadakkancherry (IPA: [ʋɐɖɐkːaːɲdʒeːɾi]) is a major town in Thrissur, Kerala. Up until 1860, this area was part of Chelakkara Taluk.
Enkakkad is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a small village with beautiful nature.

Veeranimangalam Mahadeva Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva and Lord Narasimha is situated at Enkakkad of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. The Lord Shiva of the temple is the Shiva Lingam facing west.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pallimanna Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pallimanna Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pallimanna Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (78 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pallimanna Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pallimanna Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pallimanna Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Pallimanna Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pallimanna Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Attoor (Kerala), Kumbalangad, Kanjirakode, Chittanda, Puducode.
